Taylor Frankie Paul's alleged 2025 texts surface in custody battle

Lawyers for Dakota Mortensen submitted alleged text messages from Taylor Frankie Paul in court this week. The messages, allegedly sent in 2025, include Paul calling herself 'fing charismatic as f' and a 'full-blown MILF.' The texts were submitted to support Mortensen's claim of erratic behavior during their custody fight.

What’s your take on Taylor Frankie Paul’s alleged texts in the custody battle?
